textByHash.e8735b96aa0c2b3677ad107d80095574ab56a11b: What? Who dares... Oh no. Oh no, no, no.
textByHash.7a6f86b5e9c0a047c224ddd9d4e775cb72df6be6: Please. Please don't kill me. I have no riches, I am but a magical researcher...
textByHash.77314eb56075dd611bb60c9b7a82b5ef0ff437e6: I... I don't know w-what you want Solus...but whatever it is, please, just t-take it and leave, please.
textByHash.80af5c7d167f463d3f38d9f3af28d373db783d49: My b-brains? I... I don't understand...
textByHash.7bc0a6f76fe18f9462c04bdd22cb07fc58bce5bf: My... r-research? I c-cannot let you have my research it is being done in order to assist my lord Zamorak.
textByHash.81c58d88cd9d560aa88b88fd655a7d24d1d9a1f2: P-please I meant no disrespect Solus, please do not kill me...
textByHash.9b10672408327f21df9262032e40cdd96895189c: Certainly. As I say, I have little information, but the cost was not too dear, was it?
textByHash.c0483332c44c4dd2ef63d6049d66507d1abbb92e: As you wish. As a powerful magician, I could sense his aura once I had encountered him, and it definitely moved East of here when he left me.
textByHash.c5e66e222ddddd590ce5eac2c38f9c70c6b65920: I am sorry I cannot be more specific, but that is all of the information I have to offer...
